title: Implement 3-role access system with faculty verification for Student Coordinators

requirements.text: Extend the backend profile role model to support three roles: Student (read-only), Student Coordinator (requires faculty verification before gaining booking permissions), and Faculty (full permissions).

quotes:
student coordinator 
student 
if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: Backend ProfileRole includes #student, #studentCoordinator, and #faculty (replacing the current two-role model).
Existing profile queries/mutations continue to work with the new role variant(s).

requirements.text: Add backend persistence and APIs for the Student Coordinator faculty-verification workflow: allow Student Coordinators to be in an unverified state after registration, allow Faculty to list pending verification requests, and allow Faculty to approve or reject verification requests.

quotes: if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: A newly registered Student Coordinator is stored as 'not verified' until faculty action.
Faculty-only query endpoint returns the list of pending Student Coordinator verification requests (at minimum: principal + email + contact details + requestedAt timestamp if available).
Faculty-only update endpoint can approve a pending request, making that principal verified.
Faculty-only update endpoint can reject a pending request, leaving the principal unverified (and with a clear reason returned or stored).
Non-faculty callers are rejected (trap) when attempting to list/approve/reject verification requests.

requirements.text: Update backend authorization enforcement so that only Faculty and verified Student Coordinators can create or cancel bookings; Students and unverified Student Coordinators must be blocked from all booking mutations (requestBooking, cancelBooking, cancelBookings) while still being allowed to read schedules and event details.

quotes:
student coordinator 
student 
if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: requestBooking traps for Student role.
requestBooking traps for Student Coordinator role when not verified.
requestBooking succeeds for verified Student Coordinator (subject to existing validation rules).
cancelBooking and cancelBookings trap for Student role.
cancelBooking and cancelBookings trap for Student Coordinator role when not verified.
cancelBooking and cancelBookings succeed for verified Student Coordinator when canceling their own eligible bookings.
Read-only endpoints (e.g., getTodaysSchedule, previewBooking, getUpcomingUserBookings, getUserBookings) remain accessible per current authentication rules.

requirements.text: Update the registration UI to let users select among Student, Student Coordinator, and Faculty, and ensure user-facing text clearly explains that Student Coordinators require faculty approval before they can book/cancel venues.

quotes:
student coordinator 
student 
if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: RegistrationGate role dropdown includes Student, Student Coordinator, and Faculty.
RegistrationGate shows clear English helper text indicating Student Coordinators must be approved by Faculty before gaining booking permissions.
Registration submission sends the selected role using the updated backend ProfileRole type.

requirements.text: Update the frontend read-only gating logic to reflect the new permission rules: Students are always read-only; Student Coordinators are read-only until verified; Faculty is not read-only.

quotes:
student coordinator 
student 
if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: The read-only hook (currently checking ProfileRole.studentCoordinator) is updated to compute read-only based on (role + coordinator verification status).
BookingPage shows BookingForm only when the user has booking permissions; otherwise it shows an English read-only/needs-approval notice.
Upcoming Events detail actions and bulk cancellation UI are disabled/hidden when the user does not have booking permissions (Students and unverified Student Coordinators).

requirements.text: Add a Faculty-only frontend dashboard/tab to manage Student Coordinator verification requests (view pending requests and approve/reject them).

quotes: if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: A new tab (e.g., "Approvals") appears only for Faculty users.
The Approvals view lists pending Student Coordinator verification requests with enough info to identify the user (principal/email/contact).
Faculty can approve or reject a request from the UI, with loading, success, and error states.
After approving/rejecting, the pending list refreshes and reflects the update.

requirements.text: Display verification status in the Profile dashboard for Student Coordinators (e.g., "Pending faculty approval" vs "Verified") and ensure the label is accurate after faculty actions.

quotes: if u select student coordinator then faculty verify it

acceptanceCriteria: ProfileDashboard shows the user role as before and additionally shows verification status when the role is Student Coordinator.
When a coordinator becomes verified, the UI updates after refresh/reload (or query invalidation) to show verified status.

requirements.text: Update the shared frontend/backend type bindings and React Query hooks to support the new role and verification fields without modifying immutable hook/provider files.
acceptanceCriteria: The generated frontend backend bindings compile with the updated ProfileRole and any new verification-related types.
New React Query hook(s) are added for: (1) fetching pending verification requests, (2) approving, (3) rejecting.
Existing hooks (useCallerUserProfile, useRegisterProfile, booking hooks) continue to compile and function, with minimal required updates to pass/parse new fields.

constraints: Backend must remain a single Motoko actor in backend/main.mo (no additional backend services).
Create/modify backend/migration.mo only if an upgrade requires migrating existing stable state to a new schema.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts(x), frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx; compose new logic around them.
Use English for all user-facing UI text.
nonGoals: Do not implement third-party authentication or role verification via external email/SMS services.
Do not add real-time updates (no WebSockets).
Do not implement a full notifications system for approvals beyond what is required to complete the verification workflow UI.
